paper_assessments.experimental_system: non-human (mouse); non-immune system (liver/hepatocytes, type 2 diabetes model)
paper_assessments.supporting_excerpt: TGIF1 reduces glycolipid metabolism disorders in mice with T2D through the miR-106b-5p/EGR2 axis.
paper_assessments.rationale: Studies TGIF1 in diabetic glycolipid metabolism; no T cells or TCR signalling involved.

paper_assessments.supporting_excerpt: Tiul1 and TGIF act as negative regulators in TGFβ1-induced IgA isotype expression.
paper_assessments.rationale: TGIF negatively regulates TGFβ-induced IgA class switching, not TCR signalling or T cell inhibition.

paper_assessments.supporting_excerpt: Tgif1 deficiency in osteoblasts disrupts cytoskeletal architecture, reducing adherence and migration.
paper_assessments.rationale: Concerns osteoblast cytoskeleton via Pak3 repression; no relevance to T cells or TCR inhibition.

paper_assessments.experimental_system: human; non-immune system (gastric cancer cell line)
paper_assessments.supporting_excerpt: Knockdown of TGIF1 inhibited proliferation, migration, and invasion of gastric cancer cells.
paper_assessments.rationale: TGIF1 knockdown affects gastric cancer proliferation via AKT; no T cell or TCR context.

paper_assessments.supporting_excerpt: No significant association was observed between the TGIF1 SNPs and litter size.
paper_assessments.rationale: SNP association study on sheep litter size; unrelated to T cells or TCR inhibition.

paper_assessments.supporting_excerpt: Tgifs repress acetyl-CoA metabolic gene expression, promoting adenoma growth in mutant Apc.
paper_assessments.rationale: TGIF role in intestinal tumor metabolism; no T cell or TCR signalling relevance.

paper_assessments.experimental_system: human; primary T cells (TCR signalling), but regulator studied is PTPN22, not TGIF1
paper_assessments.phenotype: proximal TCR signalling inhibition or attenuation
paper_assessments.supporting_excerpt: Ser325 phosphorylation enhances PTPN22's inhibitory effect on TCR signaling.
paper_assessments.rationale: Directly addresses TCR inhibition but concerns PTPN22, not candidate regulator TGIF1; irrelevant to TGIF1.

paper_assessments.experimental_system: human/mouse xenograft; non-immune system (esophageal cancer cell line)
paper_assessments.supporting_excerpt: Knockdown of TGIF attenuated proliferation and tumorigenicity of EC109 cells.
paper_assessments.rationale: TGIF knockdown affects esophageal cancer proliferation/apoptosis; no T cell or TCR context.

paper_assessments.experimental_system: human; T cells (TCR repertoire, immunotherapy), no TGIF1 involvement
paper_assessments.supporting_excerpt: Review explores using patient TCR repertoire data to select therapeutic TCRs.
paper_assessments.rationale: Review of TCR engineering for immunotherapy; does not mention TGIF1 or TCR inhibition by it.

paper_assessments.supporting_excerpt: Tgif1-deficient mouse cells show premature senescence and increased TGFβ signaling.
paper_assessments.rationale: Tgif1 loss causes fibroblast senescence via TGFβ; no T cell or TCR relevance.

parsed.tier_rationale: No retrieved primary study materially links TGIF1 to TCR inhibition or a closely related inhibitory T cell phenotype. TGIF1 papers concern metabolism, cancer proliferation, osteoblasts, IgA class switching, senescence, and sheep reproduction. The only TCR-inhibition study (PMC11237943) concerns PTPN22, not TGIF1, and the TCR review (PMC12346228) does not involve TGIF1. No papers therefore support any evidence tier.
